description: binding canonical message — fixed 8-line core, no extensions
valid mutual-signature binding — BIP-322 + Nostr both verify, both cover same message
tampered BIP-322 signature — Nostr side still valid; binding MUST be rejected
tampered Nostr event signature — BIP-322 side still valid; binding MUST be rejected
principal field carries an embedded LF — MUST be rejected (line-smuggling defense)
v0 attestation message (header literal "orangecheck") submitted to the binding verifier — MUST be rejected, headers never cross-verify
Nostr event signs a different canonical message than btc_signature covers — MUST be rejected (single-message rule)
